blocks.name: 自定义代码块
blocks.desc: 文本过大时输入文本组件耗时过久，改用自定义代码

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import pyperclip
pyperclip.copy(清单字典['ckbllc'])
suc=sendiRPA.Browser.setText(_browser=glv["hWeb"], xpath=sendiRPA.createXpath(xpath="//label[contains(text(),'窗口办理流程说明')]/following-sibling::div//textarea",iframe=[]), _text='', is_encrypt=False, is_addinput=False, delayBefore=0, delayAfter=0, continue_On_Failure=True, _timeout=1)
try:
    ele = hWeb.find_element(By.XPATH, "//label[contains(text(),'窗口办理流程说明')]/following-sibling::div//textarea")
    ele.send_keys(Keys.CONTROL, 'v')
    logger.info("窗口办理流程说明输入成功", exc_info=True)
except Exception as e:
    logger.info("窗口办理流程说明输入失败", exc_info=True)

inputs.name: 自定义代码块
inputs.value:
from selenium.webdriver.common.keys import Keys
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
import pyperclip
pyperclip.copy(清单字典['wsbllc'])
suc=sendiRPA.Browser.setText(_browser=glv["hWeb"], xpath=sendiRPA.createXpath(xpath="//label[contains(text(),'网上办理流程说明')]/following-sibling::div//textarea",iframe=[]), _text='', is_encrypt=False, is_addinput=False, delayBefore=0, delayAfter=0, continue_On_Failure=True, _timeout=1)
try:
    ele = hWeb.find_element(By.XPATH, "//label[contains(text(),'网上办理流程说明')]/following-sibling::div//textarea")
    ele.send_keys(Keys.CONTROL, 'v')
    logger.info("网上办理流程说明输入成功", exc_info=True)
except Exception as e:
    logger.info("网上办理流程说明输入失败", exc_info=True)
